## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Contract Impact

- [ ] New contracts added
- [ ] Existing storage layout changed
- [ ] Access control logic changed
- [ ] External/public function behavior changed

## Validation Checklist

- [ ] `forge fmt --check`
- [ ] `forge build --sizes`
- [ ] `forge test -vvv`
- [ ] `forge coverage`
- [ ] Gas snapshot reviewed (`forge snapshot`)

## Security Notes

List assumptions, trust boundaries, and any new attack surfaces introduced.

## Deployment and Verification

- [ ] Requires deployment script updates
- [ ] Requires explorer verification updates
- [ ] No deployment impact
